SPECIALIZED SECTORS: Oil & Gas

Enconsta is a premier global partner delivering multidisciplinary engineering, procurement, construction, operations & maintenance, and manpower solutions serving global refinery, petrochemical, wind, solar, and industrial infrastructure.

01 / THE ENGINEERING UNIVERSE

End-to-End Solutions

Comprehensive multidisciplinary services supporting energy and infrastructure asset lifecycles.

Our Services
02 / WHO WE ARE

Seasoned EPC Industry Experts

Enconsta is a dynamic engineering solutions provider established by a team of seasoned industry professionals.

With a strong foundation in multidisciplinary engineering and design, the company brings together decades of versatile experience across onshore and offshore projects, including refineries, petrochemicals, power plants, and other industrial infrastructure.

Enconsta operates with a global outlook, leveraging its extensive resource pool and strategic partnerships to deliver high-quality, end-to-end engineering and commissioning solutions.

Our Vision

To become a globally respected provider of comprehensive engineering services, delivering innovative design and detailing solutions to the Process and Energy industries.

Our Mission

To deliver high-quality engineering services tailored to meet client needs, integrating intelligent design, creative problem-solving, and a commitment to performance excellence.

Our Core Values

Uncompromising Quality

Adhering to strict standards to ensure execution excellence and safety.

Integrity & Transparency

Honest and clear alignment with clients, partners, and engineering audits.

Health, Safety & Environment

Loss prevention design protecting personnel, assets, and ecosystems.

Customer-Centric Commitment

Tailored scoping and detailed engineering exceeding expectations.

Employee Growth & Empowerment

Continuous training and professional development in engineering fields.

Innovation & Improvement

Integrating emerging technologies, digital tools, and smart checks.

04 / DIGITAL TWIN INTELLIGENCE

AI Engineering Command Center

Integrating neural computing platforms into legacy engineering pipelines to automate checking and secure operations.

01

Plant Model Reconstruction

Procedural structures are mapped with sensor fields to create live digital twins.

02

AI Asset Analysis

Algorithms parse drawings and configurations to check compliance limits.

03

Risk & Integrity Detection

Predictive loops analyze stresses (RBI API 580) and flags corrosion risks.

04

Operational Optimization

CMMS asset registers dynamically adjust cycles to extend equipment life.

LIVE SIMULATION PIPELINE
P&ID Auto Review

Asset Integrity
RAM Study Loaded
Predictive Maintenance
RCM Loop Locked
Document Gen
100% ISO Compliant
05 / CLEAN ENERGY & DECARBONIZATION

Expertise in Clean Energy

Guiding energy producers through the green transition. Delivering structural engineering, sizing, and load calculations for offshore wind farms, utility-scale solar installations, and battery energy storage systems (BESS).

06 / GLOBAL NETWORK

International Operations

With operations centers, fabrication units, and engineering offices in Dubai, Chennai, Hyderabad, and Bengaluru, we execute projects across the Middle East, Africa, and Europe.

07 / TRUSTED NETWORK

Our Associates & Partners

08A / COMPLIANCE

Quality Management System

Our operations are governed through a robust QMS aligned with ISO 55000 standards to meet stringent safety and regulatory benchmarks.

1
Policies

Defining organizational commitments, safety regulations, and corporate values.

2
Manuals

Outlining the framework structure, discipline scope, and procedural limits.

3
Guidelines & Procedures

Detailed technical controls for process simulations, calculations, and audits.

4
Templates, Forms & Records

Standardizing test documentation, review checklists, and structural sheets.

08B / MANUFACTURING

Fabrication & Skid Systems

We operate in-house fabrication units in Chennai and Hyderabad, providing turnkey process skids and specialized heavy equipment.

  • Modular Process Skids: Fully integrated packages incorporating piping, instruments, mechanical, and electrical components.
  • Specialized Equipment: Thermal exchangers, high-pressure vessels, desalters, separator columns, pig launchers, and receivers.
  • Piping & Structural: Pipe rack structures, piping spools, manifolds, and chemical injection skids.
  • Parallel Construction: Dual-track site fabrication and modular engineering, accelerating project commissioning timelines.

Engineering Strength. Constructing Excellence.
